title: DPRK / Swiss Yodeling over Pyongyang
description: DPRK - We visited the Grand People's Palace, the National Library. This enormous marble palace, a reading and learning center of North Korea, also had a large audio room containing a huge library of folk music from all over the world -- KIM IL SUNG'S favorite pet -- filled with dozens of desks and radio sets. From the vast selection of  Swiss songs we chose the yodel "Min Vatr isch en Appezöller...".
